markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr and GrowthX to discuss content updates and strategies for Intoxalock's various web properties.](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Intoxalock launched DUI.org and Breathe Easy websites recently, signaling significant growth and multiple brand management](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Content production is outpacing review capacity, creating a backlog of 54 articles pending review](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Keyword density optimization (aiming for \~1% for short-tail keywords) and secondary keyword inclusion are priority areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Intoxalock is part of a larger parent company (Consumer Safety Technologies) with multiple brands and 100s of employees](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates and Scale

  - [Mindr publicly launched after 6 months in stealth, growing from 0 to $3M ARR with 25 clients](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Intoxalock is part of Consumer Safety Technologies, managing multiple brands (Intoxalock, Breathe Easy Insurance, DUI.org, EDS, Keeper)](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Company has 100s of employees, including large support and marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Intoxalock prevents 20,000+ impaired driving attempts monthly via their ignition interlock devices](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [Current production: 10 articles/week, 123 topics covered to date](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [20 new topics added for content approval](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [5 articles in progress, 54 articles pending review (major bottleneck)](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Review process limited to Jessica and Brian, causing delays](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Legal review adds additional complexity and time to the process](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Aim for 1% keyword density for short-tail keywords (2-3 words)](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Long-tail keywords (4+ words) may not reach 1% density naturally](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Incorporate secondary keywords to support primary keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Writers to review all articles for keyword density and optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Website Launches and Content Migration

  - [DUI.org launched on the meeting day (2024-12-05)](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Breathe Easy website relaunched \~1 week prior](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Intoxalock site migrated to Kentico CMS (timing unclear)](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Recent focus on migrating blogs from Intoxalock to DUI.org](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Potential Future Initiatives

  - [Backlink strategy proposed by Jimmy for difficult keywords and high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Keeper (portable breathalyzer product) may be a focus area in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessica to connect with Brian about reviewing remaining content and approving topics](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Team to continue optimizing existing articles for keyword density and secondary keywords](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Jessica to discuss potential backlink strategy with Lauren](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Prateek's team to review and optimize articles for keyword density before submission](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Jessica to update "remarks" section in shared documents with any additional feedback](https://fathom.video/share/aqGJmQ7u5NV5TpdKrXF-zzzDgTZXob-9?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
